author: mysticryuujin
content: I was just looking at this `reth p2p bootnode` is probably your best bet for a lightweight bootnode on the EL side, lighthouse has a bootnode option as well on the CL side

author: .fjl
content: You can also use the `devp2p` tool from go-ethereum

author: .fjl
content: It has an official replacement for the `bootnode` tool
